chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-785 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 10-10-2024 Mr. Amir Ali Bhutto, Advocate for petitioner. Ms. Shabbiran Lashari, Advocate for respondents-T.C, Kotdiji a/w Zahid Khoso, Accounts Clerk, Town Committee, Kotdji. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kubar, Assistant A.G. ***** Accounts Clerk, T.C, Kotdji has brought five cheques of Rs.500,000/- each and one cheque of Rs.5,21,304/- in the name of the petitioner. Accountant of this Court to retain the said cheques and hand over to the petitioner after proper verification and identification. Counsel for respondents states that entire pensionery benefits have been paid to the petitioner and there remains nothing against the Town Committee, Kotdiji. It is made clear that in case the cheques are dis-honored, the respondents-T.C, Kotdiji shall be exposed to contempt of Court proceedings. Accordingly, this petition having served its purpose stands disposed of in the above manner. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
